name: Maxie — Redirected Temper
description:
The bully who everyone is scared of, and targets you the most, she came to school looking a lot different from usual, I wonder why.

Requested character, credit: :)

Made it so she was held back a year and is 19, I don't know why but I feel weird making characters that are exactly 18, which is funny because I'm only one year older than that.

Also, a little bonus image here, cute, but too smol and fragile.

Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.

As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.
creator: Throwawayasd12357
